relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The priestly and Mosaic generations are named at Sinai.
Aaron's four sons are remembered.
The priests are anointed and their hands filled for service.
Nadab and Abihu's rupture leaves Eleazar and Ithamar serving.
YHWH speaks a distinct vocation for Levi.
Levi is brought near to assist Aaron.
They keep the charge of priest and congregation.
They guard the vessels and service of the dwelling-place.
The Levites are given for sacred service.
Aaron's sons guard priestly approach.
YHWH speaks substitution.
Levi stands in place of Israel's firstborn.
The firstborn belong to the Liberator from Egypt.
YHWH speaks the Levite census.
Levi is counted from one month old upward.
Moses counts by YHWH's mouth.
Gershon, Kohath, and Merari form the three houses.
Gershon's clans are named.
Kohath's clans are named.
Merari's clans are named.
The Gershonite clans are gathered.
Their number is recorded.
Gershon camps west of the dwelling-place.
Their leader is named.
They carry coverings and entrance screen.
They tend courtyard hangings, screen, and cords.
The Kohathite clans are gathered.
Their number is recorded for holy-place charge.
Kohath camps south of the dwelling-place.
Their leader is named.
They carry the most holy furnishings.
Eleazar oversees the holy-place keepers.
The Merarite clans are gathered.
Their number is recorded.
Merari camps north of the dwelling-place.
They carry frames, bars, pillars, sockets, and tools.
They carry courtyard supports, pegs, and cords.
Moses, Aaron, and sons camp before the entrance.
The full Levite count is remembered.
Israel's firstborn males are counted.
Levi and Levite livestock stand in substitution.
Moses counts every firstborn as commanded.
The firstborn total exceeds the Levites.
YHWH speaks the redemption balance.
Levi belongs to YHWH in place of the firstborn.
The numerical excess requires redemption.
Five sanctuary shekels are assigned for each excess firstborn.
The silver is given to Aaron and sons.
Moses gathers the redemption silver.
The total silver is recorded.
Moses gives it as YHWH commanded.

contemplative_note: Numbers 3 distributes sacred responsibility among clans and converts firstborn obligation into Levite service and redemption. The accounting serves covenant order; it never prices the soul.
